text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Ooh, my eyes are watery... Maybe I've been reading my grimoire too much.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I've learned a ton! I even learned how to
summon a meteor!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
First, I get a crystal and some salt... Then I take
the crystal and... I...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Uh...
Um, what was it again?
